title: erysimum flavum subsp. altaicum
intro: Erysimum flavum subsp. altaicum, also known as the Altaic Wallflower, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and robust growth. The medicinal properties of the Altaic Wallflower include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the Altaic Wallflower is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
